SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (28640735.pdf)
SUMMARY: Strategic HR leader with over 30 years of experience in creating and implementing human resources initiatives, managing operations, and leading teams. Proven track record in talent acquisition, employee development, and organizational growth.
SKILLS: customer-oriented, strategic business partner, talent acquisition and management, employee relations, coaching and mentoring, project management, HR operations, finance, administration, IT, budgeting, contract negotiations

SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
JOB TITLE: Director of HR
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2013 to Present
DESCRIPTION: Directly report to the CEO. Led HR, administration, and technology operations with two direct reports. Created employee handbook, designed annual survey, implemented payroll system, developed wellness program, managed recruitment and onboarding.

SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
JOB TITLE: Vice President and Director of Human Resources and Administration
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2006 to January 2013
DESCRIPTION: Grew a start-up from 45 employees in 8 states to 215 across 32 states and Puerto Rico. Led all HR functions until 2011. Implemented company-wide initiatives, reduced turnover, created employee handbook, developed training programs.

SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
JOB TITLE: Business Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2001 to January 2006
DESCRIPTION: Managed office operations for a law firm. Led HR, finance, administration, and IT functions. Implemented new computer systems, managed payroll, conducted financial analysis.

SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
JOB TITLE: Vice President/Business Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 1988 to January 2001
DESCRIPTION: Administered and grew office talent. Managed budgets, forecasts, and financial statements. Led relocation projects, developed employee handbooks, instituted recognition programs.

SOURCE: 28640735.pdf
DEGREE: BS in Human Resources Management Business Administration
